item.title: F-012: Find and Replace
item.intent: In-document search and replace is essential for editing longer documents — must support regex for power users
item.description: Cmd+F to invoke find bar. Plain text and regex modes. Match highlighting in document. Replace one / replace all. Case-sensitive toggle.
acceptanceCriteria: User searches for a regex pattern in a 500-line document — all matches highlighted
Replace-all is a single undo step
Search in a 5000-line document returns results within 200ms
Invalid regex shows a clear error message, does not crash
